test.name: TC1 Admin Issue Yellow Card First Time To test007

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.arg: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Login did not succeed — password field still visible (may be blacklisted)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//table | //input[contains(@placeholder,'ค้นหา') or contains(@placeholder,'Search') or @type='search'] | //*[contains(text(),'ผู้ใช้') or contains(text(),'User')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'ค้นหา') or contains(@placeholder,'Search') or @type='search' or contains(@class,'search')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.arg: xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'ค้นหา') or contains(@placeholder,'Search') or @type='search' or contains(@class,'search')]
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'test007' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'ค้นหา') or contains(@placeholder,'Search') or @type='search' or contains(@class,'search')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'ค้นหา') or contains(@placeholder,'Search') or @type='search' or contains(@class,'search')]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="32551517ccf2c90f2ac3ef0966617f16", element="f.22ACB55DBF23245BEEFDFB9B6BF6388A.d.403432A317BA36C0A3B48CBEAE397D98.e.161")>'

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(text(),'ไปออกใบเตือน') or contains(.,'ไปออกใบเตือน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'ไปออกใบเตือน') or contains(.,'ไปออกใบเตือน')]'.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ออกใบเตือน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ใบเหลือง')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select' by label ก่อกวน / ทำลายทรัพย์สินในรถ.
kw.arg: ก่อกวน / ทำลายทรัพย์สินในรถ
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ทดสอบระบบ blacklist โดย admin' into text field 'xpath=//textarea'.
kw.arg: ทดสอบระบบ blacklist โดย admin
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ออก ใบเหลือง') or contains(.,'ออกใบเหลือง')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'ออก ใบเหลือง') or contains(.,'ออกใบเหลือง')]
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ออก ใบเหลือง') or contains(.,'ออกใบเหลือง')]'.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ออกใบเหลืองสำเร็จ
kw.arg: ออกใบเหลืองสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Admin ออกใบเหลืองครั้งที่ 1 ให้ user test007 (PASSENGER)

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=User ควรยังเข้าสู่ระบบได้หลังโดนใบเหลือง 1 ครั้ง
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: TC2 Passed — user ยังเข้าสู่ระบบได้หลังโดนใบเหลือง 1 ครั้ง
kw.arg: TC2 Passed — user ยังเข้าสู่ระบบได้หลังโดนใบเหลือง 1 ครั้ง
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ตรวจสอบว่า user ที่โดนใบเหลือง 1 ครั้ง ยังสามารถเข้าสู่ระบบได้

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//input[@type="password"]' did not disappear in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@type="password"]' did not disappear in 5 seconds.

kw.arg: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Login did not succeed — password field still visible (may be blacklisted)
kw.arg: Login did not succeed — password field still visible (may be blacklisted)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'suspended') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'ไม่สามารถเข้าใช้งานได้')]' did not appear in 8 seconds.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'suspended') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'ไม่สามารถเข้าใช้งานได้')]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'blacklist') or contains(text(),'ถูกระงับ') or contains(text(),'blocked') or contains(text(),'อีเมลนี้') or contains(text(),'ใช้งานแล้ว') or contains(text(),'already')]' did not appear in 8 seconds.

test.name: TC8 Blacklisted User Cannot Re-Register With Same Phone

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'สมัครสมาชิก') or contains(text(),'Register')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//*[contains(text(),'สมัครสมาชิก') or contains(text(),'Register')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'สมัครสมาชิก') or contains(text(),'Register')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.arg: TC7 Passed — เบอร์โทรเดิมถูกบล็อกที่ Step 2
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.
